query:
INSERT INTO interest_submissions (name, email, interestType, createdAt)
SELECT hostName, email, 'traveler', NOW()
FROM host_listings
WHERE email IS NOT NULL AND email != ''
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE email=email;
